claimText: AIM4NatuRe was launched by the Food and Agriculture Organization (FAO) to improve monitoring and reporting of global ecosystem restoration efforts.
evidenceExcerpt: Launched by: The Food and Agriculture Organization (FAO) on Earth Day. Aim: To improve monitoring and reporting of global ecosystem restoration efforts.
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the launching agency of the initiative.
distractorHooks: International Union for Conservation of Nature (IUCN)

claimText: AIM4NatuRe aligns with Target 2 of the Global Biodiversity Framework (GBF) to restore at least 30 percent of degraded ecosystems by 2030.
evidenceExcerpt: ...to restore at least 30% of degraded ecosystems by 2030, as outlined in Target 2 of the Global Biodiversity Framework (GBF).
examUse: Statement-based question testing the specific target and framework associated with the initiative.
distractorHooks: Restoring 50 percent of degraded ecosystems by 2050

claimText: The AIM4NatuRe initiative is an expansion of the FAO's AIM4Forests Programme.
examUse: Statement-based question linking the initiative to its parent programme.
